---
title: "Pediatric Heart Transplant MCS"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-20"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#Load in the relevant R packages!

library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(survival)
library(coxme)
library(tidycmprsk)
library(cmprsk)
library(ggsurvfit)
library(patchwork)
library(broom)
library(data.table)
library(purrr)
library(haven)
library(gt)
library(gtsummary)
library(clinfun)


conflicted::conflicts_prefer(dplyr::select)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(purrr::map)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(lubridate::year)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(dplyr::lag)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(dplyr::filter)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(dplyr::between)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(dplyr::first)
conflicted::conflicts_prefer(dplyr::last)

```


``` {r load datasets}

#Load all of the datasets!

thoracic_wlhistory_data = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/STAR 202606/thoracic_wlhistory_data.sas7bdat", NULL)

thoracic_data = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/STAR 202606/thoracic_data.sas7bdat", NULL)

thoracic_stat1a = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/STAR 202606/thoracic_stat1a.sas7bdat", NULL)

thoracic_stat1b = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/STAR 202606/thoracic_stat1b.sas7bdat", NULL)

thoracic_mcs_device = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/STAR 202606/thoracic_mcs_device.sas7bdat", NULL)

deceased_donor_data = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/STAR 202606/deceased_donor_data.sas7bdat", NULL)

#This dataset is not part of the STAR file and must be requested separately from the OPTN. This includes the full donor match runs for heart transplant candidates from 2018 to 2025
ptr_hrhl = read_sas("~/Desktop/R Project Data/STAR 202606/ptr_hrhl.sas7bdat", NULL)


```


``` {r build cohort}


# ── STAR extract date ─────────────────────────────────────────────
max_end_date <- thoracic_data %>%
  mutate(END_DATE = as.Date(END_DATE)) %>%
  summarise(max_date = max(END_DATE, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  pull(max_date)

cat("STAR extract date:", as.character(max_end_date), "\n")

# ── Step 1: All pediatric HR candidates in date range ─────────────
ped_all <- thoracic_data %>%
  filter(WL_ORG == "HR", INIT_AGE < 18,
         as.Date(INIT_DATE) >= mdy("03-22-2016"),
         as.Date(INIT_DATE) <= mdy("06-30-2025")) %>%
  mutate(
    INIT_DATE   = as.Date(INIT_DATE),
    END_DATE    = as.Date(END_DATE),
    death       = as.integer(REM_CD %in% c(8, 13)),
    transplant  = as.integer(REM_CD == 4),
    list_year   = year(INIT_DATE),
    follow_days = as.numeric(END_DATE - INIT_DATE)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE, END_DATE, follow_days,
         death, transplant, list_year, REM_CD)

cat("Step 1 — All ped HR candidates in date range:",
    nrow(ped_all), "\n")

# ── Step 2: Exclude missing or negative follow-up ─────────────────
ped_valid <- ped_all %>%
  filter(!is.na(follow_days), follow_days >= 0)

cat("Step 2 — After excluding missing/negative follow-up:",
    nrow(ped_valid), "\n")
cat("  Excluded:", nrow(ped_all) - nrow(ped_valid), "\n")

# ── Step 3: Delisted candidates only ──────────────────────────────

#This step is critical because the STAR MCS file does not include patients who are still actively listed for transplant as of the data extraction date.
delisted <- thoracic_data %>%
  filter(WL_ORG == "HR", INIT_AGE < 18) %>%
  mutate(end_date_star = as.Date(END_DATE)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(REM_CD), end_date_star < max_end_date) %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, end_date_star)

ped_delisted <- ped_valid %>%
  inner_join(delisted, by = "WL_ID_CODE")

cat("Step 3 — After excluding still-listed candidates:",
    nrow(ped_delisted), "\n")
cat("  Excluded (still listed):",
    nrow(ped_valid) - nrow(ped_delisted), "\n")

# ── Final analytic cohort ─────────────────────────────────────────
analytic_era_2025 <- ped_delisted %>%
  mutate(
    event = case_when(
      death == 1      ~ 1L,
      transplant == 1 ~ 2L,
      TRUE            ~ 0L
    ),
    event = factor(event, levels = c(0, 1, 2)),
    era = case_when(
      list_year %in% 2016:2018 ~ "2016-2018",
      list_year %in% 2019:2021 ~ "2019-2021",
      list_year %in% 2022:2025 ~ "2022-2025"
    ),
    era = factor(era, levels = c("2016-2018",
                                 "2019-2021",
                                 "2022-2025"))
  )

cat("\nFinal cohort:", nrow(analytic_era_2025), "\n")
cat("Era distribution:\n")
analytic_era_2025 %>% count(era) %>% print()

cat("\nOutcome distribution:\n")
analytic_era_2025 %>%
  mutate(event_int = as.integer(as.character(event))) %>%
  count(event_int) %>%
  mutate(
    label = case_when(
      event_int == 0 ~ "Censored",
      event_int == 1 ~ "Death/Deterioration",
      event_int == 2 ~ "Transplant"
    ),
    pct = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  print()

cat("\nExclusion summary:\n")
cat("  Total in date range:     ", nrow(ped_all), "\n")
cat("  Excluded (follow-up):    ",
    nrow(ped_all) - nrow(ped_valid), "\n")
cat("  Excluded (still listed): ",
    nrow(ped_valid) - nrow(ped_delisted), "\n")
cat("  Final analytic cohort:   ",
    nrow(analytic_era_2025), "\n")


# Median follow-up time and IQR for all 6,088 candidates
followup_summary <- analytic_era_2025 %>%
  summarise(
    n_candidates = n_distinct(WL_ID_CODE),
    median_followup_days = median(follow_days, na.rm = TRUE),
    q1_followup_days = quantile(follow_days, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
    q3_followup_days = quantile(follow_days, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

print(followup_summary)

cat(
  "Median follow-up:",
  followup_summary$median_followup_days,
  "days (IQR",
  followup_summary$q1_followup_days,
  "to",
  followup_summary$q3_followup_days,
  "days)\n"
)



```


``` {r create time-varying dataset}
# ── Shared device classification function ──────────────────────────
classify_device <- function(DEVICE_TYPE, LVAD_BRAND, VAD_BRAND, RVAD_BRAND,
                             VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT, PERCU_BRAND) {
  is_berlin <- (DEVICE_TYPE == "LVAD" & LVAD_BRAND == "Berlin Heart EXCOR") |
               (DEVICE_TYPE == "RVAD" & RVAD_BRAND == "Berlin Heart EXCOR") |
               (DEVICE_TYPE == "Non-Dischargeable VAD" & VAD_BRAND == "Berlin Heart EXCOR")

  percutaneous_brands <- c(
    "Impella 5.5", "Impella Recover 5.0", "Impella Recover 2.5", "Impella CP",
    "Cardiac Assist Tandem Heart"
  )

  dplyr::case_when(
    is_berlin & DEVICE_TYPE == "LVAD"             ~ "Berlin Heart - Left",
    is_berlin & DEVICE_TYPE == "RVAD"              ~ "Berlin Heart - Right",
    is_berlin & VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT == "Left"      ~ "Berlin Heart - Left",
    is_berlin & VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT == "Right"     ~ "Berlin Heart - Right",
    is_berlin & VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT == "Single"    ~ "Berlin Heart - Single",

    LVAD_BRAND %in% percutaneous_brands            ~ "Percutaneous LVAD",
    VAD_BRAND  %in% percutaneous_brands            ~ "Percutaneous LVAD",
    PERCU_BRAND %in% percutaneous_brands           ~ "Percutaneous LVAD",

    DEVICE_TYPE == "RVAD"                          ~ "Right VAD",
    DEVICE_TYPE %in% c("Non-Dischargeable VAD", "Dischargeable VAD", "Percutaneous Device") &
      VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT == "Right"                ~ "Right VAD",
    DEVICE_TYPE %in% c("Non-Dischargeable VAD", "Dischargeable VAD", "Percutaneous Device") &
      VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT == "Single"               ~ "Single VAD (SVAD)",

    DEVICE_TYPE == "LVAD" & LVAD_BRAND == "Other, Specify" ~ "Non-Dischargeable LVAD",
    DEVICE_TYPE == "Non-Dischargeable VAD" & VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT == "Left" ~ "Non-Dischargeable LVAD",

    DEVICE_TYPE == "Percutaneous Device" & VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT == "Left" ~ "Percutaneous LVAD",

    DEVICE_TYPE == "Dischargeable VAD" & VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT == "Left" ~ "Durable LVAD",
    DEVICE_TYPE == "LVAD" & LVAD_BRAND %in% c(
      "Heartware HVAD", "Heartmate II", "Heartmate XVE", "Heartmate VE",
      "Heartmate IP", "Heartsaver VAD", "Thoratec PVAD")        ~ "Durable LVAD",

    DEVICE_TYPE %in% c("ECMO", "VA ECMO", "VV ECMO")           ~ "ECMO",

    TRUE                                                        ~ "Other MCS"
  )
}

# ── Build device-row dataset ──────────────────────────────────────
ped_mcs_analytic <- thoracic_mcs_device %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  mutate(
    IMPLANT_DATE = as.Date(IMPLANT_DATE),
    EXPLANT_DATE = as.Date(EXPLANT_DATE),
    device_group = classify_device(DEVICE_TYPE, LVAD_BRAND, VAD_BRAND,
                                    RVAD_BRAND, VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT, PERCU_BRAND)
  )

# ── Base candidates ───────────────────────────────────────────────
base_cands_2025 <- analytic_era_2025 %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE, end_day = follow_days,
         event, era, list_year)

# ── Device transitions ────────────────────────────────────────────
device_transitions_2025 <- ped_mcs_analytic %>%
  left_join(base_cands_2025 %>%
              dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE),
            by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  mutate(
    implant_day = as.numeric(IMPLANT_DATE - INIT_DATE),
    explant_day = as.numeric(EXPLANT_DATE - INIT_DATE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(implant_day = pmax(implant_day, 0)) %>%
  filter(is.na(explant_day) | explant_day > 0) %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, device_group, implant_day, explant_day)

# ── Episode builder ────────────────────────────────────────────────
build_tv_episodes_2025 <- function(wl_id) {
  cand    <- base_cands_2025 %>% filter(WL_ID_CODE == wl_id)
  devs    <- device_transitions_2025 %>% filter(WL_ID_CODE == wl_id)
  end_day <- as.numeric(cand$end_day)
  
  if (nrow(devs) == 0) {
    return(tibble(
      WL_ID_CODE = wl_id, tstart = 0, tstop = end_day,
      event = cand$event, device_bh = "No MCS",
      era = cand$era, list_year = cand$list_year
    ))
  }
  
  change_pts <- sort(unique(c(
    0,
    devs$implant_day[devs$implant_day < end_day],
    devs$explant_day[!is.na(devs$explant_day) &
                       devs$explant_day > 0 &
                       devs$explant_day < end_day],
    end_day
  )))
  
  tibble(
    tstart = change_pts[-length(change_pts)],
    tstop  = change_pts[-1]
  ) %>%
    filter(tstop > tstart) %>%
    mutate(
      device_bh = map2_chr(tstart, tstop, function(s, e) {
        mid         <- (s + e) / 2
        active_devs <- devs %>%
          filter(implant_day <= mid,
                 is.na(explant_day) | explant_day > mid)
        
        if (nrow(active_devs) == 0) return("No MCS")
        
        has_ecmo   <- any(active_devs$device_group == "ECMO")
        has_bh     <- any(active_devs$device_group %in%
                            c("Berlin Heart - Left", "Berlin Heart - Right",
                              "Berlin Heart - Single"))
        has_bivad  <- any(active_devs$device_group %in%
                            c("Right VAD", "Single VAD (SVAD)"))
        has_perc   <- any(active_devs$device_group == "Percutaneous LVAD")
        has_ndlvad <- any(active_devs$device_group == "Non-Dischargeable LVAD")
        has_dlvad  <- any(active_devs$device_group == "Durable LVAD")
        has_other  <- any(active_devs$device_group == "Other MCS")
        
        dplyr::case_when(
          has_ecmo             ~ "ECMO",
          has_bh                ~ "Berlin Heart EXCOR",
          has_bivad              ~ "Right/Single/Biventricular Support",
          has_ndlvad             ~ "Non-Dischargeable LVAD",
          has_dlvad              ~ "Durable LVAD",
          has_perc | has_other   ~ "Other MCS",
          TRUE                    ~ "No MCS"
        )
      }),
      is_last    = tstop == end_day,
      event      = if_else(is_last, cand$event, factor(0, levels = c(0, 1, 2))),
      WL_ID_CODE = wl_id,
      era        = cand$era,
      list_year  = cand$list_year
    )
}

# ── Run episode builder ───────────────────────────────────────────
cat("Building TV episodes...\n")
tv_episodes_2025 <- map_dfr(base_cands_2025$WL_ID_CODE, build_tv_episodes_2025)

# ── Build cause-specific dataset ──────────────────────────────────
tv_episodes_cs_2025 <- tv_episodes_2025 %>%
  mutate(
    device_bh = factor(device_bh, levels = c(
      "No MCS", "ECMO", "Berlin Heart EXCOR", "Right/Single/Biventricular Support",
      "Non-Dischargeable LVAD", "Durable LVAD", "Other MCS"
    )),
    event     = factor(event, levels = c(0, 1, 2)),  
    event_int = as.integer(as.character(event)),
    event_cs  = case_when(event_int == 1 ~ 1L, TRUE ~ 0L),
    tstop     = case_when(tstop <= tstart ~ tstart + 0.5, TRUE ~ tstop),
    berlin_heart = factor(
      if_else(device_bh == "Berlin Heart EXCOR", "Berlin Heart EXCOR", "Other/No MCS"),
      levels = c("Other/No MCS", "Berlin Heart EXCOR")
    ),
    non_dc_lvad = factor(
      if_else(device_bh == "Non-Dischargeable LVAD", "Non-Dischargeable LVAD", "Other/No MCS"),
      levels = c("Other/No MCS", "Non-Dischargeable LVAD")
    )
  )

cat("Episodes:", nrow(tv_episodes_cs_2025), "\n")
cat("Events:", sum(tv_episodes_cs_2025$event_cs), "\n")
cat("\nDevice distribution:\n")
tv_episodes_cs_2025 %>% count(device_bh) %>% print()

# ── Sanity check: every patient should have at most 1 event ───────
cat("\nEvents per patient (should be 0 or 1 only):\n")
tv_episodes_cs_2025 %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  summarise(events_per_patient = sum(event_cs), .groups = "drop") %>%
  count(events_per_patient) %>%
  print()

listing_ctr <- thoracic_data %>%
  filter(WL_ORG == "HR", INIT_AGE < 18) %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, LISTING_CTR_CODE) %>%
  distinct()

tv_episodes_cs_2025 <- tv_episodes_cs_2025 %>%
  left_join(listing_ctr, by = "WL_ID_CODE")


```


``` {r exploratory cox models}

#This is not included in the paper and only shows what we tried before settling on the final model!

# ── tidy_coxme helper ─────────────────────────────────────────────
tidy_coxme <- function(model) {
  coefs <- coef(model)
  ses   <- sqrt(diag(vcov(model)))
  tibble(
    term    = names(coefs),
    HR      = exp(coefs),
    HR_low  = exp(coefs - 1.96 * ses),
    HR_high = exp(coefs + 1.96 * ses),
    p.value = 2 * pnorm(-abs(coefs / ses))
  )
}

# ── Model 1: Unadjusted ───────────────────────────────────────────
cox_unadj_2025 <- coxme(
  Surv(follow_days,
       as.integer(as.character(event)) == 1) ~
    era + (1 | LISTING_CTR_CODE),
  data = analytic_era_2025 %>%
    left_join(listing_ctr, by = "WL_ID_CODE")
)

# ── Model 2: Berlin Heart binary ──────────────────────────────────
cox_tv_bh_2025 <- coxme(
  Surv(tstart, tstop, event_cs) ~
    era + berlin_heart +
    (1 | LISTING_CTR_CODE),
  data = tv_episodes_cs_2025
)

# ── Model 3: Full device breakdown ────────────────────────────────
cox_tv_bh_sep_2025 <- coxme(
  Surv(tstart, tstop, event_cs) ~
    era + device_bh +
    (1 | LISTING_CTR_CODE),
  data = tv_episodes_cs_2025
)

# ── Model 4: Non-Dischargeable LVAD binary ────────────────────────
cox_tv_nondc_2025 <- coxme(
  Surv(tstart, tstop, event_cs) ~
    era + non_dc_lvad +
    (1 | LISTING_CTR_CODE),
  data = tv_episodes_cs_2025
)

# ── Print results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("Model 1 — Unadjusted era HRs:\n")
tidy_coxme(cox_unadj_2025) %>%
  filter(grepl("^era", term)) %>%
  mutate(across(c(HR, HR_low, HR_high),
                ~ round(., 2)),
         p.value = round(p.value, 4)) %>%
  print()

cat("\nModel 2 — Berlin Heart binary era HRs:\n")
tidy_coxme(cox_tv_bh_2025) %>%
  filter(grepl("^era", term)) %>%
  mutate(across(c(HR, HR_low, HR_high),
                ~ round(., 2)),
         p.value = round(p.value, 4)) %>%
  print()

cat("\nModel 3 — Full device breakdown era HRs:\n")
tidy_coxme(cox_tv_bh_sep_2025) %>%
  filter(grepl("^era", term)) %>%
  mutate(across(c(HR, HR_low, HR_high),
                ~ round(., 2)),
         p.value = round(p.value, 4)) %>%
  print()

cat("\nModel 3 — Device HRs:\n")
tidy_coxme(cox_tv_bh_sep_2025) %>%
  filter(grepl("^device_bh", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = gsub("device_bh", "", term),
         across(c(HR, HR_low, HR_high),
                ~ round(., 2)),
         p.value = round(p.value, 4)) %>%
  print()

cat("\nModel 4 — Non-Dischargeable LVAD era HRs:\n")
tidy_coxme(cox_tv_nondc_2025) %>%
  filter(grepl("^era", term)) %>%
  mutate(across(c(HR, HR_low, HR_high),
                ~ round(., 2)),
         p.value = round(p.value, 4)) %>%
  print()

# ── Era HR comparison figure ──────────────────────────────────────
extract_era_hrs_cox <- function(model, label) {
  tidy_coxme(model) %>%
    filter(grepl("^era", term)) %>%
    mutate(
      era   = gsub("era", "", term),
      model = label
    ) %>%
    select(era, HR, HR_low, HR_high, p.value, model) %>%
    bind_rows(tibble(
      era     = "2016-2018", HR = 1,
      HR_low  = 1, HR_high = 1,
      p.value = NA, model = label
    ))
}

hr_comparison_final <- bind_rows(
  extract_era_hrs_cox(cox_unadj_2025,
                      "Unadjusted"),
  extract_era_hrs_cox(cox_tv_bh_2025,
                      "Adjusted: Berlin Heart Binary"),
  extract_era_hrs_cox(cox_tv_bh_sep_2025,
                      "Adjusted: Full Device Breakdown"),
  extract_era_hrs_cox(cox_tv_nondc_2025,
                      "Adjusted: Non-Dischargeable LVAD")
) %>%
  mutate(era = factor(era, levels = c("2016-2018",
                                      "2019-2021",
                                      "2022-2025")))

ggplot(hr_comparison_final,
       aes(x = era, y = HR,
           color = model, group = model)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = HR_low, ymax = HR_high),
                width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1,
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 1.6),
                     breaks = seq(0.5, 1.6, 0.1)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Unadjusted"                       = "#374e55",
    "Adjusted: Berlin Heart Binary"    = "#b24745",
    "Adjusted: Full Device Breakdown"  = "#df8f44",
    "Adjusted: Non-Dischargeable LVAD" = "#00a1d5"
  )) +
  labs(x     = "Listing Era",
       y     = "HR for Death/Deterioration\n(Reference: 2016-2018)",
       color = NULL) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold",
                                      size = 14),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90",
                                      linewidth = 0.3)
  )

# ── Device HR forest plot ─────────────────────────────────────────
device_hrs_sep <- tidy_coxme(cox_tv_bh_sep_2025) %>%
  filter(grepl("^device_bh", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = gsub("device_bh", "", term)) %>%
  rename(device = term) %>%
  bind_rows(tibble(
    device  = "No MCS", HR = 1,
    HR_low  = 1, HR_high = 1,
    p.value = NA
  )) %>%
  mutate(
    device = factor(device, levels = c(
      "No MCS",
      "Durable LVAD",
      "Berlin Heart EXCOR",
      "Non-Dischargeable LVAD",
      "Right/Single/Biventricular Support",
      "Other MCS",
      "ECMO"
    )),
    significant = case_when(
      is.na(p.value) ~ NA,
      TRUE           ~ p.value < 0.05
    )
  )

ggplot(device_hrs_sep,
       aes(x = HR, y = fct_rev(device))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = HR_low,
                     xmax = HR_high),
                 height = 0.2) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1,
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_x_log10() +
  labs(x = "Hazard Ratio for Death/Deterioration (Log Scale)",
       y = "Device Type") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold",
                                      size = 14),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 14),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90",
                                      linewidth = 0.3)
  )

```


``` {r main cox model}

# ── Covariates ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
covariates_2025 <- thoracic_data %>%
  filter(WL_ORG == "HR", INIT_AGE < 18) %>%
  mutate(
    diagnosis = case_when(
      TCR_DGN > 999  & TCR_DGN < 1007              ~ "Dilated Cardiomyopathy",
      TCR_DGN > 1049 & TCR_DGN < 1100              ~ "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy",
      TCR_DGN == 1207                               ~ "CHD - With Surgery",
      TCR_DGN %in% c(1203, 1205, 1206)              ~ "CHD - No Surgery/Unknown",
      TCR_DGN == 1201                               ~ "Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy",
      TCR_DGN >= 1100 & TCR_DGN <= 1199            ~ "Re-Heart Transplant",
      TRUE                                          ~ "Other"
    ),
    diagnosis    = factor(diagnosis, levels = c(
      "Dilated Cardiomyopathy",
      "CHD - With Surgery",
      "CHD - No Surgery/Unknown",
      "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy",
      "Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy",
      "Re-Heart Transplant",
      "Other"
    )),
    init_wgt_kg = INIT_WGT_KG_CALC,
    wgt_cat = factor(case_when(
      INIT_WGT_KG_CALC < 10                          ~ "<10 kg",
      INIT_WGT_KG_CALC >= 10 & INIT_WGT_KG_CALC < 25 ~ "10-25 kg",
      INIT_WGT_KG_CALC >= 25                          ~ ">25 kg"),
      levels = c("<10 kg", "10-25 kg", ">25 kg")),
    blood_type_O = as.integer(ABO == "O"),
    sex = factor(case_when(
      GENDER == "M" ~ "Male",
      GENDER == "F" ~ "Female",
      TRUE          ~ NA_character_
    ), levels = c("Male", "Female")),
    race = factor(case_when(
      ETHCAT == 1 ~ "White",
      ETHCAT == 2 ~ "Black",
      ETHCAT == 4 ~ "Hispanic/Latino",
      ETHCAT == 5 ~ "Asian",
      TRUE        ~ "Other"
    ), levels = c("White", "Black",
                  "Hispanic/Latino",
                  "Asian", "Other"))
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_AGE, init_wgt_kg, wgt_cat,
         diagnosis, blood_type_O, sex, race,
         LISTING_CTR_CODE)

# ── Covariate completeness ────────────────────────────────────────
cat("Covariate completeness:\n")
covariates_2025 %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  summarise(
    n          = n(),
    pct_age    = round(mean(!is.na(INIT_AGE)) * 100, 1),
    pct_weight = round(mean(!is.na(wgt_cat)) * 100, 1),
    pct_diag   = round(mean(!is.na(diagnosis)) * 100, 1),
    pct_blood  = round(mean(!is.na(blood_type_O)) * 100, 1),
    pct_sex    = round(mean(!is.na(sex)) * 100, 1),
    pct_race   = round(mean(!is.na(race)) * 100, 1)
  ) %>%
  print()

cat("\nDiagnosis distribution:\n")
covariates_2025 %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  count(diagnosis) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1)) %>%
  print()

cat("\nWeight category distribution:\n")
covariates_2025 %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  count(wgt_cat) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1)) %>%
  print()

cat("\nSex distribution:\n")
covariates_2025 %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  count(sex) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1)) %>%
  print()

cat("\nRace distribution:\n")
covariates_2025 %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  count(race) %>%
  mutate(pct = round(n / sum(n) * 100, 1)) %>%
  print()

cat("\nAge-weight correlation:\n")
covariates_2025 %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  summarise(r = round(cor(INIT_AGE, init_wgt_kg,
                          use = "complete.obs"), 3)) %>%
  print()

# ── Join to tiem-varying episodes ───────────────────────────────────────────
tv_episodes_full <- tv_episodes_cs_2025 %>%
  left_join(
    covariates_2025 %>%
      dplyr::select(-LISTING_CTR_CODE),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  )

# ── full device breakdown + covariates (PRIMARY MODEL) ───
cox_tv_bh_sep_full <- coxme(
  Surv(tstart, tstop, event_cs) ~
    era + device_bh +
    INIT_AGE + wgt_cat + diagnosis +
    blood_type_O + sex + race +
    (1 | LISTING_CTR_CODE),
  data = tv_episodes_full
)

# ── Print results ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("\nModel — era HRs:\n")
tidy_coxme(cox_tv_bh_sep_full) %>%
  filter(grepl("^era", term)) %>%
  mutate(across(c(HR, HR_low, HR_high),
                ~ round(., 2)),
         p.value = round(p.value, 4)) %>%
  print()

cat("\nModel — device HRs:\n")
tidy_coxme(cox_tv_bh_sep_full) %>%
  filter(grepl("^device", term)) %>%
  mutate(term = gsub("device_bh", "", term),
         across(c(HR, HR_low, HR_high),
                ~ round(., 2)),
         p.value = round(p.value, 4)) %>%
  print()

cat("\nModel — all covariate HRs:\n")
tidy_coxme(cox_tv_bh_sep_full) %>%
  filter(!grepl("^era", term), !grepl("^device", term)) %>%
  mutate(across(c(HR, HR_low, HR_high),
                ~ round(., 2)),
         p.value = round(p.value, 4)) %>%
  print()

# ── Model C forest plot ───────────────────────────────────────────
model_c_hrs <- tidy_coxme(cox_tv_bh_sep_full) %>%
  mutate(
    label = case_when(
      term == "era2019-2021"                                      ~ "Era 2019-2021 vs 2016-2018",
      term == "era2022-2025"                                      ~ "Era 2022-2025 vs 2016-2018",
      term == "device_bhECMO"                                     ~ "ECMO vs No MCS",
      term == "device_bhBerlin Heart EXCOR"                             ~ "Berlin Heart EXCOR vs No MCS",
      term == "device_bhRight/Single/Biventricular Support"       ~ "Right/Single/Biventricular Support vs No MCS",
      term == "device_bhNon-Dischargeable LVAD"                   ~ "Non-Dischargeable LVAD vs No MCS",
      term == "device_bhDurable LVAD"                             ~ "Durable LVAD vs No MCS",
      term == "device_bhOther MCS"                                ~ "Other MCS vs No MCS",
      term == "INIT_AGE"                                          ~ "Age at Listing (Years)",
      term == "wgt_cat10-25 kg"                                   ~ "Weight 10-25 kg vs <10 kg",
      term == "wgt_cat>25 kg"                                     ~ "Weight >25 kg vs <10 kg",
      term == "blood_type_O"                                      ~ "Blood Type O vs Non-O",
      term == "sexFemale"                                         ~ "Female vs Male",
      term == "raceBlack"                                         ~ "Black vs White",
      term == "raceHispanic/Latino"                                ~ "Hispanic/Latino vs White",
      term == "raceAsian"                                          ~ "Asian vs White",
      term == "raceOther"                                          ~ "Other Race vs White",
      term == "diagnosisCHD - With Surgery"                       ~ "CHD (With Surgery) vs DCM",
      term == "diagnosisCHD - No Surgery/Unknown"                 ~ "CHD (No Surgery/Unknown) vs DCM",
      term == "diagnosisRestrictive Cardiomyopathy"                ~ "RCM vs DCM",
      term == "diagnosisHypertrophic Cardiomyopathy"               ~ "HCM vs DCM",
      term == "diagnosisRe-Heart Transplant"                       ~ "Re-Transplant vs DCM",
      term == "diagnosisOther"                                     ~ "Other vs DCM",
      TRUE                                                        ~ term
    ),
    group = case_when(
      grepl("^era", term)       ~ "Era",
      grepl("^device", term)    ~ "Device",
      term == "INIT_AGE"        ~ "Demographics",
      grepl("^wgt_cat", term)   ~ "Demographics",
      term == "blood_type_O"    ~ "Demographics",
      term == "sexFemale"       ~ "Demographics",
      grepl("^race", term)      ~ "Demographics",
      grepl("^diagnosis", term) ~ "Diagnosis",
      TRUE                      ~ "Other"
    ),
    group = factor(group, levels = c("Era", "Device",
                                     "Demographics",
                                     "Diagnosis")),
    label = factor(label, levels = rev(c(
      "Era 2019-2021 vs 2016-2018",
      "Era 2022-2025 vs 2016-2018",
      "ECMO vs No MCS",
      "Right/Single/Biventricular Support vs No MCS",
      "Non-Dischargeable LVAD vs No MCS",
      "Berlin Heart EXCOR vs No MCS",
      "Durable LVAD vs No MCS",
      "Other MCS vs No MCS",
      "Age at Listing (Years)",
      "Weight 10-25 kg vs <10 kg",
      "Weight >25 kg vs <10 kg",
      "Blood Type O vs Non-O",
      "Female vs Male",
      "Black vs White",
      "Hispanic/Latino vs White",
      "Asian vs White",
      "Other Race vs White",
      "CHD (With Surgery) vs DCM",
      "CHD (No Surgery/Unknown) vs DCM",
      "RCM vs DCM",
      "HCM vs DCM",
      "Re-Transplant vs DCM",
      "Other vs DCM"
    ))),
    sig_stars = case_when(
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***",
      p.value < 0.01  ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.05  ~ "*",
      TRUE            ~ ""
    )
  )

fig_model_c <- ggplot(model_c_hrs,
                      aes(x = HR, y = label)) +
  geom_point(aes(color = group, shape = group), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbarh(aes(xmin = HR_low, xmax = HR_high,
                     color = group),
                 height = 0.2) +
  geom_text(
    aes(x     = HR_low,
        label = paste0(
          sprintf("%.2f (%.2f–%.2f)", HR, HR_low, HR_high),
          " ", sig_stars)),
    hjust  = 1.1,
    vjust  = 0.5,
    size   = 4,
    color  = "black"
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1,
             linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  facet_grid(group ~ ., scales = "free_y",
             space = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "Era"          = "#374e55",
      "Device"       = "#b24745",
      "Demographics" = "#df8f44",
      "Diagnosis"    = "#00a1d5"
    ),
    name = "Covariate Group"
  ) +
  scale_shape_manual(
    values = c(
      "Era"          = 15,
      "Device"       = 16,
      "Demographics" = 17,
      "Diagnosis"    = 18
    ),
    name = "Covariate Group"
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    trans  = "log",
    breaks = c(0.1, 0.3, 0.5, 1.0, 5.0, 10.0, 50.0),
    labels = c("0.1", "0.3", "0.5", "1.0", "5.0", "10.0", "50.0"),
    limits = c(0.01, 50)
  ) +
  labs(
    x        = "Hazard Ratio (Log Scale)",
    y        = NULL,
    caption  = "* p<0.05  ** p<0.01  *** p<0.001"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.title       = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 13),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.background   = element_rect(fill  = "gray95",
                                      color = "gray80"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_line(color = "gray90",
                                      linewidth = 0.3),
    plot.caption       = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0)
  )

print(fig_model_c)




#This code tests for missingness of any variables in our model


model_vars <- c(
  "tstart",
  "tstop",
  "event_cs",
  "era",
  "device_bh",
  "INIT_AGE",
  "wgt_cat",
  "diagnosis",
  "blood_type_O",
  "sex",
  "race",
  "LISTING_CTR_CODE"
)

# 1. Candidate-level covariate missingness
candidate_missingness <- tv_episodes_full %>%
  distinct(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    INIT_AGE,
    wgt_cat,
    diagnosis,
    blood_type_O,
    sex,
    race,
    LISTING_CTR_CODE
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    total_candidates = n(),
    missing_age = sum(is.na(INIT_AGE)),
    missing_weight = sum(is.na(wgt_cat)),
    missing_diagnosis = sum(is.na(diagnosis)),
    missing_blood_type = sum(is.na(blood_type_O)),
    missing_sex = sum(is.na(sex)),
    missing_race = sum(is.na(race)),
    missing_center = sum(is.na(LISTING_CTR_CODE))
  )

cat("\nCandidate-level missingness:\n")
print(candidate_missingness)

# 2. Missingness for every variable used in the model
variable_missingness <- tv_episodes_full %>%
  summarise(
    across(
      all_of(model_vars),
      list(
        n_missing = ~ sum(is.na(.)),
        pct_missing = ~ round(mean(is.na(.)) * 100, 2)
      )
    )
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    everything(),
    names_to = c("variable", ".value"),
    names_pattern = "^(.*)_(n_missing|pct_missing)$"
  )

cat("\nMissingness among time-varying rows:\n")
print(variable_missingness, n = Inf)

# 3. Identify complete cases exactly as required by the Cox model
tv_episodes_full_cc <- tv_episodes_full %>%
  mutate(
    complete_for_primary_model =
      complete.cases(across(all_of(model_vars)))
  )

# 4. Number of time-varying rows retained and excluded
row_counts <- tv_episodes_full_cc %>%
  summarise(
    total_rows = n(),
    complete_case_rows = sum(complete_for_primary_model),
    excluded_rows = sum(!complete_for_primary_model),
    percent_rows_excluded =
      round(100 * excluded_rows / total_rows, 2)
  )

cat("\nTime-varying row counts:\n")
print(row_counts)

# 5. Number of unique candidates retained and excluded
candidate_counts <- tv_episodes_full_cc %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  summarise(
    all_rows_complete = all(complete_for_primary_model),
    any_row_complete = any(complete_for_primary_model),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  summarise(
    total_candidates = n(),
    candidates_with_complete_data = sum(any_row_complete),
    candidates_entirely_excluded = sum(!any_row_complete),
    percent_candidates_excluded =
      round(100 * candidates_entirely_excluded / total_candidates, 2),
    candidates_with_any_incomplete_row = sum(!all_rows_complete)
  )

cat("\nCandidate counts:\n")
print(candidate_counts)

# 6. Overlap: which covariates caused candidates to be incomplete?
candidate_missing_patterns <- tv_episodes_full %>%
  distinct(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    INIT_AGE,
    wgt_cat,
    diagnosis,
    blood_type_O,
    sex,
    race,
    LISTING_CTR_CODE
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    missing_age = is.na(INIT_AGE),
    missing_weight = is.na(wgt_cat),
    missing_diagnosis = is.na(diagnosis),
    missing_blood_type = is.na(blood_type_O),
    missing_sex = is.na(sex),
    missing_race = is.na(race),
    missing_center = is.na(LISTING_CTR_CODE),
    missing_any_covariate =
      missing_age |
      missing_weight |
      missing_diagnosis |
      missing_blood_type |
      missing_sex |
      missing_race |
      missing_center
  ) %>%
  count(
    missing_age,
    missing_weight,
    missing_diagnosis,
    missing_blood_type,
    missing_sex,
    missing_race,
    missing_center,
    missing_any_covariate,
    sort = TRUE
  )

cat("\nCandidate-level missing-data patterns:\n")
print(candidate_missing_patterns, n = Inf)

# 7. Verify the number of rows actually used by the fitted model
cat("\nObservations used by fitted Cox model:\n")
print(nobs(cox_tv_bh_sep_full))






# Candidates in the full analytic cohort but absent from the TV dataset
missing_from_tv <- analytic_era_2025 %>%
  anti_join(
    tv_episodes_cs_2025 %>%
      distinct(WL_ID_CODE),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  )

cat("Candidates absent from TV episodes:", nrow(missing_from_tv), "\n")
print(missing_from_tv)

# Check whether the absent candidate had device records
missing_from_tv_details <- missing_from_tv %>%
  left_join(
    thoracic_data %>%
      filter(WL_ORG == "HR") %>%
      transmute(
        WL_ID_CODE,
        INIT_DATE_raw = as.Date(INIT_DATE),
        END_DATE_raw = as.Date(END_DATE),
        REM_CD
      ) %>%
      distinct(),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    thoracic_mcs_device %>%
      group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
      summarise(
        n_mcs_records = n(),
        implant_dates = paste(
          unique(as.character(as.Date(IMPLANT_DATE))),
          collapse = "; "
        ),
        explant_dates = paste(
          unique(as.character(as.Date(EXPLANT_DATE))),
          collapse = "; "
        ),
        .groups = "drop"
      ),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    n_mcs_records = coalesce(n_mcs_records, 0L)
  )

print(missing_from_tv_details, width = Inf)
```




``` {r check for interactions for cox model}

# # ── Manual LRT for coxme ──────────────────────────────────────────
# manual_lrt_coxme <- function(model_base, model_int, df) {
#   lr_stat <- 2 * (model_int$loglik[2] -
#                     model_base$loglik[2])
#   p_val   <- pchisq(lr_stat, df = df,
#                     lower.tail = FALSE)
#   cat("LR statistic:", round(lr_stat, 3),
#       "| df:", df,
#       "| p:", round(p_val, 4), "\n")
# }
# 
# # ── Base model ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# cox_base_me <- coxme(
#   Surv(tstart, tstop, event_cs) ~
#     list_year + berlin_heart +
#     INIT_AGE + diagnosis +
#     blood_type_O + sex + race +
#     (1 | LISTING_CTR_CODE),
#   data = tv_episodes_full
# )
# 
# # ── Test 1: Year × Berlin Heart ───────────────────────────────────
# cox_year_bh_int_me <- coxme(
#   Surv(tstart, tstop, event_cs) ~
#     list_year * berlin_heart +
#     INIT_AGE + diagnosis +
#     blood_type_O + sex + race +
#     (1 | LISTING_CTR_CODE),
#   data = tv_episodes_full
# )
# cat("LRT — year × Berlin Heart (df=1):\n")
# manual_lrt_coxme(cox_base_me,
#                  cox_year_bh_int_me, df = 1)
# cat("\nInteraction term:\n")
# tidy_coxme(cox_year_bh_int_me) %>%
#   filter(grepl(":", term)) %>%
#   mutate(across(c(HR, HR_low, HR_high),
#                 ~ round(., 3)),
#          p.value = round(p.value, 4)) %>%
#   print()
# 
# # ── Test 2: Age × Berlin Heart ────────────────────────────────────
# cox_age_bh_int_me <- coxme(
#   Surv(tstart, tstop, event_cs) ~
#     list_year + berlin_heart * INIT_AGE +
#     diagnosis +
#     blood_type_O + sex + race +
#     (1 | LISTING_CTR_CODE),
#   data = tv_episodes_full
# )
# cat("\nLRT — age × Berlin Heart (df=1):\n")
# manual_lrt_coxme(cox_base_me,
#                  cox_age_bh_int_me, df = 1)
# cat("\nInteraction term:\n")
# tidy_coxme(cox_age_bh_int_me) %>%
#   filter(grepl(":", term)) %>%
#   mutate(across(c(HR, HR_low, HR_high),
#                 ~ round(., 3)),
#          p.value = round(p.value, 4)) %>%
#   print()
# 
# # ── Test 3: Diagnosis × Berlin Heart ─────────────────────────────
# # df updated 5 → 6: diagnosis now has 7 levels (Dilated Cardiomyopathy
# # reference + 6 others) since CHD was split into "With Surgery" /
# # "No Surgery/Unknown" — 6 non-reference interaction terms, not 5.
# cox_diag_bh_int_me <- coxme(
#   Surv(tstart, tstop, event_cs) ~
#     list_year + berlin_heart * diagnosis +
#     INIT_AGE +
#     blood_type_O + sex + race +
#     (1 | LISTING_CTR_CODE),
#   data = tv_episodes_full
# )
# cat("\nLRT — diagnosis × Berlin Heart (df=6):\n")
# manual_lrt_coxme(cox_base_me,
#                  cox_diag_bh_int_me, df = 6)
# cat("\nInteraction terms:\n")
# tidy_coxme(cox_diag_bh_int_me) %>%
#   filter(grepl(":", term)) %>%
#   mutate(across(c(HR, HR_low, HR_high),
#                 ~ round(., 3)),
#          p.value = round(p.value, 4)) %>%
#   print()
# 
# # ── Summary ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# cat("\n=== INTERACTION TEST SUMMARY ===\n")
# cat("If all p > 0.10 → main effects model correctly specified\n")
# cat("If year × BH p < 0.05 → Berlin Heart protective effect\n")
# cat("  is changing over time\n")
# cat("If age × BH p < 0.05 → Berlin Heart effect differs by age\n")
# cat("If diagnosis × BH p < 0.05 → CHD vs DCM patients on\n")
# cat("  Berlin Heart have different mortality profiles\n")

```



``` {r snapshot figures}
# ── Device data for ALL pediatric candidates ever on waitlist ──────
# (not restricted to analytic_era_2025 — snapshots need device status
# for anyone active on the waitlist at each monthly snapshot date,
# including still-listed candidates excluded from the delisted cohort)


#This chunk is for producing Figure 1 and eFigures 1 and 2
all_ped_ids <- thoracic_data %>%
  filter(WL_ORG == "HR", INIT_AGE < 18) %>%
  pull(WL_ID_CODE)

ped_mcs_snap <- thoracic_mcs_device %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% all_ped_ids) %>%
  mutate(
    IMPLANT_DATE = as.Date(IMPLANT_DATE),
    EXPLANT_DATE = as.Date(EXPLANT_DATE),
    device_group = classify_device(DEVICE_TYPE, LVAD_BRAND, VAD_BRAND,
                                    RVAD_BRAND, VENTRICULAR_SUPPORT, PERCU_BRAND)
  )

# ── Candidate list for snapshots ──────────────────────────────────
ped_cands_snap <- thoracic_data %>%
  filter(WL_ORG == "HR", INIT_AGE < 18,
         as.Date(INIT_DATE) <= mdy("12-31-2024")) %>%
  mutate(INIT_DATE = as.Date(INIT_DATE),
         END_DATE  = as.Date(END_DATE)) %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE, END_DATE, REM_CD)

# ── Status history ────────────────────────────────────────────────
ped_hx_snap <- thoracic_wlhistory_data %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% ped_cands_snap$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  mutate(CHG_DATE = as.Date(CHG_DATE)) %>%
  left_join(ped_cands_snap %>%
              select(WL_ID_CODE, END_DATE),
            by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  arrange(WL_ID_CODE, CHG_DATE) %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  mutate(
    CHG_END_DATE = lead(CHG_DATE, default = NA),
    CHG_END_DATE = if_else(is.na(CHG_END_DATE),
                           END_DATE, CHG_END_DATE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# ── Status 1A justification forms ─────────────────────────────────
just_1a_snap <- thoracic_stat1a %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% ped_cands_snap$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  mutate(
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE = as.Date(UPGRADE_EXTDATE),
    exc_1a          = REQ6_CRITERIA_NOT_MET,
    STATUS_JUST = case_when(
      REQ1_CONTINUOUS_VENTILATION == 1              ~ "Mechanical Ventilation",
      REQ3_DUCTAL_DEPENDENCY == 1                   ~ "Ductal-Dependent Circulation",
      REQ4_CHD_DIAGNOSIS == 1                       ~ "Congenital Heart Disease",
      REQ5_CIRCULATORY_DEVICE == 1 |
        REQ2_BALLOONPUMP == 1                       ~ "MCS",
      REQ6_CRITERIA_NOT_MET == 1                    ~ "1A Exception",
      TRUE                                          ~ "Unknown/Not Specified"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, UPGRADE_EXTDATE, exc_1a,
         STATUS_JUST, REQ5_CIRCULATORY_DEVICE,
         REQ2_BALLOONPUMP)

# ── Status 1B justification forms ─────────────────────────────────
just_1b_snap <- thoracic_stat1b %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% ped_cands_snap$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  mutate(
    UPGRADE_EXTDATE = as.Date(UPGRADE_EXTDATE),
    exc_1b          = REQ3_CRITERIA_NOT_MET
  ) %>%
  select(WL_ID_CODE, UPGRADE_EXTDATE, exc_1b)

# ── Snapshot dates ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
snapshot_dates <- seq.Date(
  as.Date("2016-05-01"),
  as.Date("2024-12-31"),
  by = "month"
)

classify_device_snapshot <- function(dt, wl_ids) {
  
  active <- ped_mcs_snap %>%
    filter(
      WL_ID_CODE %in% wl_ids,
      IMPLANT_DATE <= dt,
      is.na(EXPLANT_DATE) | EXPLANT_DATE > dt
    )
  
  if (nrow(active) == 0) {
    return(tibble(WL_ID_CODE   = wl_ids,
                  device_final = "No MCS"))
  }
  
  result <- active %>%
    group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
    summarise(
      has_ecmo   = any(device_group == "ECMO"),
      has_bh     = any(device_group %in%
                        c("Berlin Heart - Left", "Berlin Heart - Right",
                          "Berlin Heart - Single")),
      has_bivad  = any(device_group %in%
                        c("Right VAD", "Single VAD (SVAD)")),
      has_perc   = any(device_group == "Percutaneous LVAD"),
      has_ndlvad = any(device_group == "Non-Dischargeable LVAD"),
      has_dlvad  = any(device_group == "Durable LVAD"),
      has_other  = any(device_group == "Other MCS"),
      .groups    = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      device_final = case_when(
        has_ecmo              ~ "ECMO",
        has_bh                 ~ "Berlin Heart EXCOR",
        has_bivad               ~ "Right/Single/Biventricular Support",
        has_ndlvad               ~ "Non-Dischargeable LVAD",
        has_dlvad                ~ "Durable LVAD",
        has_perc | has_other     ~ "Other MCS",
        TRUE                      ~ "No MCS"
      )
    ) %>%
    select(WL_ID_CODE, device_final)
  
  tibble(WL_ID_CODE = wl_ids) %>%
    left_join(result, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
    mutate(device_final = replace_na(device_final, "No MCS"))
}

# ── Snapshot function ──────────────────────────────────────────────
get_snapshot <- function(dt) {
  active <- ped_hx_snap %>%
    filter(CHG_DATE <= dt,
           (is.na(CHG_END_DATE) | CHG_END_DATE > dt),
           !UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD %in% c(1999, 2999))
  
  n_total <- nrow(active)
  ids_1a  <- active %>%
    filter(UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2010) %>%
    pull(WL_ID_CODE)
  ids_1b  <- active %>%
    filter(UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2020) %>%
    pull(WL_ID_CODE)
  n_1a    <- length(ids_1a)
  n_1b    <- length(ids_1b)
  n_2     <- sum(active$UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2030)
  
  just_1a_recent <- just_1a_snap %>%
    filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% ids_1a,
           UPGRADE_EXTDATE <= dt) %>%
    group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
    slice_max(UPGRADE_EXTDATE, n = 1,
              with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  just_1b_recent <- just_1b_snap %>%
    filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% ids_1b,
           UPGRADE_EXTDATE <= dt) %>%
    group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
    slice_max(UPGRADE_EXTDATE, n = 1,
              with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    ungroup()
  
  n_exc_1a   <- sum(just_1a_recent$exc_1a == 1,
                    na.rm = TRUE)
  n_exc_1b   <- sum(just_1b_recent$exc_1b == 1,
                    na.rm = TRUE)
  
  mcs_ids <- just_1a_recent %>%
    filter(REQ5_CIRCULATORY_DEVICE == 1 |
             REQ2_BALLOONPUMP == 1) %>%
    pull(WL_ID_CODE)
  
  n_just_mcs <- length(mcs_ids)
  
  indic <- just_1a_recent %>%
    count(STATUS_JUST) %>%
    mutate(snapshot_date = dt)
  
  devices <- if (length(mcs_ids) > 0) {
    classify_device_snapshot(dt, mcs_ids) %>%
      count(device_final) %>%
      rename(device_group  = device_final) %>%
      mutate(snapshot_date = dt)
  } else {
    tibble(device_group  = character(),
           n             = integer(),
           snapshot_date = dt)
  }
  
  summary <- tibble(
    snapshot_date = dt,
    n_total       = n_total,
    n_1a          = n_1a,
    n_1b          = n_1b,
    n_2           = n_2,
    prop_1a       = n_1a / max(n_total, 1),
    prop_exc_1a   = n_exc_1a / max(n_1a, 1),
    prop_exc_1b   = n_exc_1b / max(n_1b, 1),
    n_just_mcs    = n_just_mcs
  )
  
  list(summary = summary,
       indic   = indic,
       devices = devices)
}

# ── Run snapshots ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("Running snapshots...\n")
results_list    <- map(snapshot_dates, get_snapshot)
summary_results <- map_dfr(results_list, "summary")
indic_results   <- map_dfr(results_list, "indic")
device_results  <- map_dfr(results_list, "devices")
cat("Done —", nrow(summary_results), "snapshots\n")

# ── Verify ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("Indication categories:\n")
indic_results %>%
  count(STATUS_JUST) %>%
  arrange(desc(n)) %>%
  print()

cat("\nDevice categories across snapshots:\n")
device_results %>%
  group_by(device_group) %>%
  summarise(
    total        = sum(n),
    avg_per_snap = round(mean(n), 1),
    max_per_snap = max(n)
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(total)) %>%
  print()


# ================================================================
# SECTION 15: SNAPSHOT FIGURES
# ================================================================

p_comp_abs <- summary_results %>%
  pivot_longer(cols      = c(n_1a, n_1b, n_2),
               names_to  = "status",
               values_to = "n") %>%
  mutate(status = recode(status,
                         n_1a = "Status 1A",
                         n_1b = "Status 1B",
                         n_2  = "Status 2")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = snapshot_date, y = n,
             color = status)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year",
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Status 1A" = "#b24745",
    "Status 1B" = "#df8f44",
    "Status 2"  = "#374e55"
  )) +
  labs(x     = NULL,
       y     = "Active Candidates",
       color = "Status") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 14,
                                      face = "bold"),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(size = 14,
                                      face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90",
                                      linewidth = 0.3)
  )

indication_colors <- c(
  "MCS"                          = "#b24745",
  "Congenital Heart Disease"     = "#df8f44",
  "1A Exception"                 = "#374e55",
  "Mechanical Ventilation"       = "#00a1d5",
  "Ductal-Dependent Circulation" = "#79af97",
  "Unknown/Not Specified"        = "#6a6599",
  "Total Status 1A"              = "black"
)

p_indic <- indic_results %>%
  filter(!is.na(STATUS_JUST)) %>%
  mutate(STATUS_JUST = factor(STATUS_JUST, levels = c(
    "MCS", "Congenital Heart Disease",
    "1A Exception", "Mechanical Ventilation",
    "Ductal-Dependent Circulation",
    "Unknown/Not Specified"
  ))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = snapshot_date, y = n,
             color = STATUS_JUST)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  geom_line(data      = summary_results,
            aes(x     = snapshot_date,
                y     = n_1a,
                color = "Total Status 1A"),
            linetype  = "dashed",
            linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(data  = summary_results,
             aes(x = snapshot_date,
                 y = n_1a,
                 color = "Total Status 1A"),
             size = 1.5) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year",
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = indication_colors) +
  labs(
    x     = NULL,
    y     = "Active Status 1A Candidates",
    color = "Listing Indication"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 13,
                                      face = "bold"),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.title.y       = element_text(size = 14,
                                      face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90",
                                      linewidth = 0.3)
  )

device_colors_snap <- c(
  "Berlin Heart EXCOR"                        = "#b24745",
  "Non-Dischargeable LVAD"              = "#df8f44",
  "Durable LVAD"                        = "#00a1d5",
  "ECMO"                                = "#374e55",
  "Right/Single/Biventricular Support"  = "#6a6599",
  "Other MCS"                           = "#adb6b6"
)

p_device <- device_results %>%
  filter(device_group != "No MCS") %>%
  mutate(device_group = factor(device_group, levels = c(
    "Berlin Heart EXCOR",
    "Non-Dischargeable LVAD",
    "Durable LVAD",
    "ECMO",
    "Right/Single/Biventricular Support",
    "Other MCS"
  ))) %>%
  complete(snapshot_date, device_group, fill = list(n = 0)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = snapshot_date, y = n,
             color = device_group)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(size = 1.5) +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 year",
               date_labels = "%Y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = device_colors_snap) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, NA)) +
  labs(
    x     = "Date",
    y     = "Active Status 1A Candidates Supported by MCS",
    color = "Device Type"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 13,
                                      face = "bold"),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 13),
    axis.title         = element_text(size = 14,
                                      face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90",
                                      linewidth = 0.3)
  )

print(p_comp_abs)
print(p_indic)
print(p_device)

device_results %>%
  filter(device_group != "No MCS") %>%
  group_by(snapshot_date) %>%
  mutate(prop_of_mcs = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  left_join(summary_results %>% select(snapshot_date, n_1a, n_just_mcs),
            by = "snapshot_date") %>%
  mutate(prop_of_1a = n / n_1a) %>%
  filter(device_group == "Berlin Heart",
         snapshot_date %in% as.Date(c("2016-05-01", "2024-12-01"))) %>%
  select(snapshot_date, n, n_just_mcs, n_1a, prop_of_mcs, prop_of_1a)


```


``` {r cifs by mcs device type}

#This section is for producing Figure 2!

# ── First Status 1A date ───────────────────────────────────────────
first_1a <- ped_hx_snap %>%
  filter(UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2010) %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  summarise(first_1a_date = min(CHG_DATE,
                                na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

# ── Initial listing status (first ever recorded status) ─────────────
# Needed to restrict this analysis to candidates whose FIRST recorded
# status was 1A, excluding candidates who started at 1B/2 and were
# later upgraded to 1A.
initial_status_1a <- ped_hx_snap %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  slice_min(CHG_DATE, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2010) %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE)

# ── Justification at first Status 1A — restricted to candidates
# whose INITIAL listing status was 1A ──────────────────────────────
just_at_listing <- just_1a_snap %>%
  inner_join(first_1a, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% initial_status_1a$WL_ID_CODE,
         UPGRADE_EXTDATE <= first_1a_date) %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  slice_max(UPGRADE_EXTDATE, n = 1,
            with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(REQ5_CIRCULATORY_DEVICE == 1 |
           REQ2_BALLOONPUMP == 1)

# ── BiVAD-aware classification using ped_mcs_analytic ─────────────
classify_device_analytic <- function(dt, wl_ids) {
  
  active <- ped_mcs_analytic %>%
    filter(
      WL_ID_CODE %in% wl_ids,
      IMPLANT_DATE <= dt,
      is.na(EXPLANT_DATE) | EXPLANT_DATE > dt
    )
  
  if (nrow(active) == 0) {
    return(tibble(WL_ID_CODE   = wl_ids,
                  device_final = "No MCS"))
  }
  
  classified <- active %>%
    group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
    summarise(
      has_ecmo   = any(device_group == "ECMO"),
      has_bh     = any(device_group %in%
                        c("Berlin Heart - Left", "Berlin Heart - Right",
                          "Berlin Heart - Single")),
      has_bivad  = any(device_group %in%
                        c("Right VAD", "Single VAD (SVAD)")),
      has_perc   = any(device_group == "Percutaneous LVAD"),
      has_ndlvad = any(device_group == "Non-Dischargeable LVAD"),
      has_dlvad  = any(device_group == "Durable LVAD"),
      has_other  = any(device_group == "Other MCS"),
      .groups    = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      device_final = case_when(
        has_ecmo              ~ "ECMO",
        has_bh                 ~ "Berlin Heart EXCOR",
        has_bivad                ~ "Right/Single/Biventricular Support",
        has_ndlvad                ~ "Non-Dischargeable LVAD",
        has_dlvad                  ~ "Durable LVAD",
        has_perc | has_other         ~ "Other MCS",
        TRUE                           ~ "No MCS"
      )
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, device_final)
  
  tibble(WL_ID_CODE = wl_ids) %>%
    left_join(classified, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
    mutate(device_final = replace_na(device_final, "No MCS"))
}

# ── Device at first Status 1A ──────────────────────────────────────
cat("Classifying devices at first Status 1A...\n")
device_at_1a <- first_1a %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% just_at_listing$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  mutate(
    device_final = map2_chr(
      WL_ID_CODE, first_1a_date,
      ~ classify_device_analytic(
        dt     = .y,
        wl_ids = .x
      ) %>%
        pull(device_final)
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, device_group = device_final)

cat("Done.\n")

# ── Verify ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cat("Device distribution at first Status 1A:\n")
device_at_1a %>%
  count(device_group, sort = TRUE) %>%
  print()

# ── MCS Status 1A cohort ───────────────────────────────────────────
mcs_1a_cohort <- analytic_era_2025 %>%
  inner_join(just_at_listing %>%
               dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE),
             by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  inner_join(device_at_1a,
             by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  inner_join(first_1a, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  mutate(
    time_1a = as.numeric(END_DATE - first_1a_date),
    time_1a = if_else(time_1a < 0, NA_real_, time_1a),
    event   = case_when(
      death == 1      ~ 1L,
      transplant == 1 ~ 2L,
      TRUE            ~ 0L
    ),
    event = factor(event, levels = c(0, 1, 2)),
    device_group = factor(device_group, levels = c(
      "ECMO",
      "Berlin Heart EXCOR",
      "Right/Single/Biventricular Support",
      "Non-Dischargeable LVAD",
      "Durable LVAD",
      "Other MCS",
      "No MCS"
    ))
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_1a),
         device_group != "No MCS")

cat("MCS Status 1A cohort:", nrow(mcs_1a_cohort), "\n")

cat("\nOutcome table by device:\n")
mcs_1a_cohort %>%
  mutate(event_int = as.integer(as.character(event))) %>%
  group_by(device_group) %>%
  summarise(
    n              = n(),
    n_death        = sum(event_int == 1),
    n_transplant   = sum(event_int == 2),
    pct_death      = round(n_death / n * 100, 1),
    pct_transplant = round(n_transplant / n * 100, 1),
    median_wait    = round(median(time_1a,
                                  na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(pct_death)) %>%
  print()

# ── CIF objects ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cif_mcs <- tidycmprsk::cuminc(
  Surv(time_1a, event) ~ device_group,
  data = mcs_1a_cohort
)

cif_direct <- cmprsk::cuminc(
  ftime   = mcs_1a_cohort$time_1a,
  fstatus = as.integer(as.character(mcs_1a_cohort$event)),
  group   = mcs_1a_cohort$device_group,
  cencode = 0
)

pval_death      <- cif_direct$Tests[1, 2]
pval_tx         <- cif_direct$Tests[2, 2]
pval_text_death <- if_else(
  pval_death < 0.001, "Gray's p < 0.001",
  sprintf("Gray's p = %.3f", pval_death))
pval_text_tx <- if_else(
  pval_tx < 0.001, "Gray's p < 0.001",
  sprintf("Gray's p = %.3f", pval_tx))

# ── Color palette ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
device_colors_cif <- c(
  "ECMO"                                = "#374e55",
  "Berlin Heart EXCOR"                        = "#b24745",
  "Right/Single/Biventricular Support"  = "#6a6599",
  "Non-Dischargeable LVAD"              = "#df8f44",
  "Durable LVAD"                        = "#00a1d5",
  "Other MCS"                           = "#79AF97FF"
)

options("ggsurvfit.switch-color-linetype" = FALSE)

# ── Figure A: Death/Deterioration ─────────────────────────────────
fig_death <- cif_mcs %>%
  ggcuminc(outcome = "1", linewidth = 1.2) +
  add_confidence_interval() +
  scale_color_manual(values = device_colors_cif,
                     name   = "Device Type") +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = device_colors_cif,
                    name    = "Device Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 0.55),
                     labels = scales::percent,
                     expand = c(0.01, 0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 90),
                     breaks = seq(0, 90, 15),
                     expand = expansion(
                       mult = c(0.02, 0.02))) +
  annotate("text", x = 85, y = 0.52,
           label = pval_text_death,
           size  = 4.5, hjust = 1) +
  labs(x     = "Days from First Status 1A",
       y     = "Cumulative Incidence of\nDeath/Deterioration",
       title = "A") +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),
    fill  = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, hjust = 0),
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 14,
                                      face = "bold"),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold",
                                      size = 14),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90",
                                      linewidth = 0.3)
  ) +
  add_risktable(
    times           = seq(0, 90, 15),
    size            = 4.5,
    risktable_stats = c("{n.risk}", "{n.event}"),
    theme           = theme_risktable_default(
      axis.text.y.size = 12,
      plot.title.size  = 12
    )
  ) +
  add_risktable_strata_symbol(
    symbol = "\u2014",
    size   = 20
  )
print(fig_death)

# ── Figure B: Transplant ───────────────────────────────────────────
fig_tx <- cif_mcs %>%
  ggcuminc(outcome = "2", linewidth = 1.2) +
  add_confidence_interval() +
  scale_color_manual(values = device_colors_cif,
                     name   = "Device Type") +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = device_colors_cif,
                    name    = "Device Type") +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1.05),
                     labels = scales::percent,
                     expand = c(0.01, 0)) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 90),
                     breaks = seq(0, 90, 15),
                     expand = expansion(
                       mult = c(0.02, 0.02))) +
  annotate("text", x = 85, y = 1.0,
           label = pval_text_tx,
           size  = 4.5, hjust = 1) +
  labs(x     = "Days from First Status 1A",
       y     = "Cumulative Incidence of\nTransplant",
       title = "B") +
  guides(
    color = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE),
    fill  = guide_legend(nrow = 2, byrow = TRUE)
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, hjust = 0),
    plot.title.position = "plot",
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 14,
                                      face = "bold"),
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold",
                                      size = 14),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90",
                                      linewidth = 0.3)
  ) +
  add_risktable(
    times           = seq(0, 90, 15),
    size            = 4.5,
    risktable_stats = c("{n.risk}", "{n.event}"),
    theme           = theme_risktable_default(
      axis.text.y.size = 12,
      plot.title.size  = 12
    )
  ) +
  add_risktable_strata_symbol(
    symbol = "\u2014",
    size   = 20
  )
print(fig_tx)


cif_mcs %>%
  tidy_cuminc() %>%
  filter(outcome %in% c("1", "2"),
         time <= 90) %>%
  group_by(outcome, strata) %>%
  slice_max(time, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = recode(outcome,
                     "1" = "Death/Deterioration",
                     "2" = "Transplant"),
    estimate = round(estimate * 100, 2),
    conf.low  = round(conf.low  * 100, 2),
    conf.high = round(conf.high * 100, 2)
  ) %>%
  select(outcome, strata, estimate, conf.low, conf.high) %>%
  arrange(outcome, desc(estimate)) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

cif_mcs %>%
  tidy_cuminc() %>%
  filter(outcome %in% c("1", "2"),
         time <= 90) %>%
  group_by(outcome, strata) %>%
  slice_max(time, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = recode(outcome,
                     "1" = "Death/Deterioration",
                     "2" = "Transplant"),
    estimate  = round(estimate * 100, 1),
    conf.low  = round(conf.low  * 100, 1),
    conf.high = round(conf.high * 100, 1),
    ci = paste0(
      format(estimate,  nsmall = 1), "% (",
      format(conf.low,  nsmall = 1), "–",
      format(conf.high, nsmall = 1), ")")
  ) %>%
  select(outcome, strata, ci) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from  = outcome,
              values_from = ci) %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(
    strata                = "Device Type",
    `Death/Deterioration` = "Death/Deterioration",
    Transplant            = "Transplant"
  ) %>%
  tab_header(title = "90-Day Cumulative Incidence by Device Type")

```



``` {r era cifs}

#Cumulative incidence plots stratified by listing era! eFigure 4!

# ── First Status 1A date ───────────────────────────────────────────
first_1a <- ped_hx_snap %>%
  filter(UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2010) %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  summarise(first_1a_date = min(CHG_DATE, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  ungroup()

# ── Initial listing status (first ever recorded status) ─────────────
initial_status_1a <- ped_hx_snap %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  slice_min(CHG_DATE, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  filter(UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2010) %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE)

# ── Justification at first Status 1A — ALL indications ─────────────
just_at_listing_all <- just_1a_snap %>%
  inner_join(first_1a, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% initial_status_1a$WL_ID_CODE,
         UPGRADE_EXTDATE <= first_1a_date) %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  slice_max(UPGRADE_EXTDATE, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup()

# ── Indications to compare ──────────────────────────────────────────
indications_to_plot <- c(
  "MCS",
  "Congenital Heart Disease",
  "Mechanical Ventilation",
  "Ductal-Dependent Circulation",
  "1A Exception"
)

# ── Era color palette ────────────────────────────────────────────
era_colors <- c(
  "2016-2018" = "#374e55",
  "2019-2021" = "#df8f44",
  "2022-2025" = "#b24745"
)

# ── All Status 1A candidates, 90-day windowed competing-risk outcome ──
all_1a_indic_90 <- analytic_era_2025 %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% initial_status_1a$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  inner_join(just_at_listing_all %>%
               dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, STATUS_JUST),
             by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  inner_join(first_1a, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  filter(STATUS_JUST %in% indications_to_plot) %>%
  mutate(
    time_1a  = as.numeric(END_DATE - first_1a_date),
    time_1a  = if_else(time_1a < 0, NA_real_, time_1a),
    event    = case_when(
      death == 1      ~ 1L,
      transplant == 1 ~ 2L,
      TRUE            ~ 0L
    ),
    time_90  = pmin(time_1a, 90),
    event_90 = if_else(time_1a > 90, 0L, event),
    event_90 = factor(event_90, levels = c(0, 1, 2)),
    indication = factor(STATUS_JUST, levels = indications_to_plot)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_1a))

cat("all_1a_indic_90 — N by indication:\n")
all_1a_indic_90 %>% count(indication) %>% print()

# ── Full (non-90-day-truncated) Status 1A cohort with list_year ────
all_1a_indic <- analytic_era_2025 %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% initial_status_1a$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  inner_join(just_at_listing_all %>%
               dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, STATUS_JUST),
             by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  inner_join(first_1a, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  filter(STATUS_JUST %in% indications_to_plot) %>%
  mutate(
    time_1a    = as.numeric(END_DATE - first_1a_date),
    time_1a    = if_else(time_1a < 0, NA_real_, time_1a),
    list_year  = year(first_1a_date),
    indication = factor(STATUS_JUST, levels = indications_to_plot)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_1a))

# ── Crash-safety helper ──────────────────────────────────────────
# cmprsk::cuminc() can segfault (crashing the whole R session, not
# just throwing a catchable error) on degenerate strata — very few
# or zero events of a given type in one era, near-identical event
# times, etc. tryCatch() cannot protect against a segfault, so we
# pre-screen strata BEFORE calling cuminc() and skip anything risky.
# Requires: >=2 eras present, >=20 rows per era, AND >=3 events of
# EACH type (death, transplant) per era.
safe_for_cuminc <- function(dat, event_col, group_col = "era") {
  if (length(unique(dat[[group_col]])) < 2) return(FALSE)
  counts <- dat %>%
    group_by(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
    summarise(
      n       = n(),
      n_ev1   = sum(as.integer(as.character(.data[[event_col]])) == 1),
      n_ev2   = sum(as.integer(as.character(.data[[event_col]])) == 2),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  all(counts$n >= 20) && all(counts$n_ev1 >= 3) && all(counts$n_ev2 >= 3)
}

# ── Era-stratified CIF by indication ──────────────────────────────
all_1a_overall <- all_1a_indic_90 %>%
  mutate(indication = "All Status 1A")

all_1a_combined <- bind_rows(all_1a_indic_90, all_1a_overall) %>%
  mutate(indication = factor(indication,
                             levels = c("All Status 1A", indications_to_plot)))

indications_combined <- c("All Status 1A", indications_to_plot)

gray_pvals_90 <- map_dfr(indications_combined, function(ind) {
  dat <- all_1a_combined %>% filter(indication == ind, !is.na(time_90))
  if (!safe_for_cuminc(dat, "event_90")) {
    cat("Skipping (unsafe strata):", ind, "\n")
    return(tibble(indication = ind, p_death = NA_real_, p_tx = NA_real_))
  }
  tryCatch({
    cif_d <- cmprsk::cuminc(
      ftime   = dat$time_90,
      fstatus = as.integer(as.character(dat$event_90)),
      group   = dat$era,
      cencode = 0
    )
    tibble(indication = ind, p_death = cif_d$Tests[1, 2], p_tx = cif_d$Tests[2, 2])
  }, error = function(e) tibble(indication = ind, p_death = NA_real_, p_tx = NA_real_))
}) %>%
  mutate(
    indication = factor(indication, levels = c("All Status 1A", indications_to_plot)),
    label_death = case_when(
      p_death < 0.001 ~ "Gray's p < 0.001",
      TRUE            ~ sprintf("Gray's p = %.3f", p_death)
    ),
    label_tx = case_when(
      p_tx < 0.001 ~ "Gray's p < 0.001",
      TRUE         ~ sprintf("Gray's p = %.3f", p_tx)
    )
  )

cif_indic_era_90 <- map_dfr(indications_combined, function(ind) {
  dat <- all_1a_combined %>% filter(indication == ind, !is.na(time_90))
  if (!safe_for_cuminc(dat, "event_90")) return(NULL)
  tryCatch({
    cif <- tidycmprsk::cuminc(Surv(time_90, event_90) ~ era, data = dat)
    tidy(cif, times = seq(0, 90, 1)) %>% mutate(indication = ind)
  }, error = function(e) NULL)
}) %>%
  mutate(
    era = gsub("era = ", "", strata),
    era = factor(era, levels = c("2016-2018", "2019-2021", "2022-2025")),
    indication = factor(indication, levels = c("All Status 1A", indications_to_plot))
  )

# ── Figure: Transplant CIF by indication × era ─────────────────────
fig_indic_tx_90 <- cif_indic_era_90 %>%
  filter(outcome == "2") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = era, fill = era, group = era)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_text(
    data = gray_pvals_90 %>%
      mutate(time = 88, estimate = Inf,
             era = factor("2016-2018", levels = c("2016-2018", "2019-2021", "2022-2025"))),
    aes(x = time, y = estimate, label = label_tx),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 1, vjust = 1.5, size = 3.5, color = "gray30"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ indication, nrow = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = era_colors, name = "Listing Era") +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = era_colors, name = "Listing Era") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 90), breaks = seq(0, 90, 30)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, expand = c(0.01, 0)) +
  labs(x = "Days from First Status 1A", y = "Cumulative Incidence of Transplant") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.background   = element_rect(fill = "gray95", color = "gray80"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3)
  )

print(fig_indic_tx_90)

# ── Figure: Death/Deterioration CIF by indication × era ────────────
fig_indic_death_90 <- cif_indic_era_90 %>%
  filter(outcome == "1") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = time, y = estimate, color = era, fill = era, group = era)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high), alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_step(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_text(
    data = gray_pvals_90 %>%
      mutate(time = 88, estimate = Inf,
             era = factor("2016-2018", levels = c("2016-2018", "2019-2021", "2022-2025"))),
    aes(x = time, y = estimate, label = label_death),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, hjust = 1, vjust = 1.5, size = 3.5, color = "gray30"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ indication, nrow = 2, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_color_manual(values = era_colors, name = "Listing Era") +
  scale_fill_manual(values  = era_colors, name = "Listing Era") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 90), breaks = seq(0, 90, 30)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent, expand = c(0.01, 0)) +
  labs(x = "Days from First Status 1A", y = "Cumulative Incidence of Death/Deterioration") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 13, face = "bold"),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    strip.text         = element_text(face = "bold", size = 12),
    strip.background   = element_rect(fill = "gray95", color = "gray80"),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90", linewidth = 0.3)
  )

print(fig_indic_death_90)

# ── 90-day CIF estimate tables ──────────────────────────────────────
cif_indic_era_90 %>%
  filter(outcome == "2") %>%
  group_by(indication, era) %>%
  filter(time == max(time[time <= 90])) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  dplyr::select(indication, era, time, estimate, conf.low, conf.high) %>%
  mutate(across(c(estimate, conf.low, conf.high), ~ round(. * 100, 1))) %>%
  arrange(indication, era) %>%
  print(n = Inf)

cif_indic_era_90 %>%
  filter(outcome == "2") %>%
  group_by(indication, era) %>%
  filter(time == max(time[time <= 90])) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(
    across(c(estimate, conf.low, conf.high), ~ round(. * 100, 2)),
    ci = paste0(estimate, "% (", conf.low, "–", conf.high, ")")
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(indication, era, ci) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = era, values_from = ci) %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(indication = "Indication") %>%
  tab_header(title = "90-Day Cumulative Incidence of Transplant by Indication and Era")

# ── Pairwise Gray's tests ──────────────────────────────────────────
era_pairs <- list(
  c("2016-2018", "2019-2021"),
  c("2016-2018", "2022-2025"),
  c("2019-2021", "2022-2025")
)

pairwise_gray_indic <- map_dfr(indications_combined, function(ind) {
  map_dfr(era_pairs, function(pair) {
    dat <- all_1a_combined %>%
      filter(indication == ind, era %in% pair, !is.na(time_90))
    if (!safe_for_cuminc(dat, "event_90")) {
      return(tibble(indication = ind, era1 = pair[1], era2 = pair[2],
                    p_death = NA_real_, p_tx = NA_real_))
    }
    tryCatch({
      cif_d <- cmprsk::cuminc(
        ftime   = dat$time_90,
        fstatus = as.integer(as.character(dat$event_90)),
        group   = dat$era,
        cencode = 0
      )
      tibble(indication = ind, era1 = pair[1], era2 = pair[2],
             p_death = cif_d$Tests[1, 2], p_tx = cif_d$Tests[2, 2])
    }, error = function(e)
      tibble(indication = ind, era1 = pair[1], era2 = pair[2],
             p_death = NA_real_, p_tx = NA_real_))
  })
}) %>%
  mutate(
    p_death_adj = pmin(p_death * 3, 1),
    p_tx_adj    = pmin(p_tx    * 3, 1),
    indication  = factor(indication, levels = c("All Status 1A", indications_to_plot))
  ) %>%
  arrange(indication, era1, era2)

print(pairwise_gray_indic, n = Inf)





```


``` {r waiting time analysis}
# ── Full (non-90-day-truncated) Status 1A cohort with list_year ────
# Same population as all_1a_indic_90, but without 90-day censoring —
# needed for waiting-time trend analysis across full follow-up.

#This is for eFigure 3!

all_1a_indic <- analytic_era_2025 %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% initial_status_1a$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  inner_join(just_at_listing_all %>%
               dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, STATUS_JUST),
             by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  inner_join(first_1a, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  filter(STATUS_JUST %in% indications_to_plot) %>%
  mutate(
    time_1a    = as.numeric(END_DATE - first_1a_date),
    time_1a    = if_else(time_1a < 0, NA_real_, time_1a),
    list_year  = year(first_1a_date),
    indication = factor(STATUS_JUST, levels = indications_to_plot)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_1a))

# ── Waiting time by indication × year ─────────────────────────────
wt_by_year <- all_1a_indic %>%
  filter(!is.na(time_1a), !is.na(indication),
         !is.na(list_year)) %>%
  mutate(list_year = as.integer(list_year))

# ── Overall JT p-value ────────────────────────────────────────────
jt_overall <- tryCatch({
  jonckheere.test(
    x           = wt_by_year$time_1a,
    g           = factor(wt_by_year$list_year,
                         ordered = TRUE),
    alternative = "increasing",
    nperm       = 2000
  )$p.value
}, error = function(e) NA_real_)

cat("Overall Status 1A JT p-value:",
    ifelse(jt_overall < 0.001, "<0.001",
           sprintf("%.3f", jt_overall)), "\n")

# ── JT trend test per indication ──────────────────────────────────
jt_results <- wt_by_year %>%
  group_by(indication) %>%
  summarise(
    p_jt = tryCatch({
      jonckheere.test(
        x           = time_1a,
        g           = factor(list_year,
                             ordered = TRUE),
        alternative = "increasing",
        nperm       = 2000
      )$p.value
    }, error = function(e) NA_real_),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    p_jt_fmt = case_when(
      p_jt < 0.001 ~ "<0.001",
      TRUE         ~ sprintf("%.3f", p_jt)
    )
  )

cat("JT trend p-values by indication:\n")
print(jt_results)

# ── Summary table ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
wt_summary <- wt_by_year %>%
  group_by(indication, list_year) %>%
  summarise(
    median = round(median(time_1a, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    q25    = round(quantile(time_1a, 0.25,
                            na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    q75    = round(quantile(time_1a, 0.75,
                            na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    median_iqr = sprintf("%.0f (%.0f–%.0f)",
                         median, q25, q75)
  )

overall_summary <- wt_by_year %>%
  group_by(list_year) %>%
  summarise(
    median = round(median(time_1a, na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    q25    = round(quantile(time_1a, 0.25,
                            na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    q75    = round(quantile(time_1a, 0.75,
                            na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    indication = "All Status 1A",
    median_iqr = sprintf("%.0f (%.0f–%.0f)",
                         median, q25, q75)
  )

wt_wide_indic <- wt_summary %>%
  select(indication, list_year, median_iqr) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from   = list_year,
    values_from  = median_iqr,
    names_prefix = "yr_"
  ) %>%
  left_join(jt_results %>%
              select(indication, p_jt_fmt),
            by = "indication")

overall_row <- overall_summary %>%
  select(indication, list_year, median_iqr) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from   = list_year,
    values_from  = median_iqr,
    names_prefix = "yr_"
  ) %>%
  mutate(p_jt_fmt = ifelse(
    jt_overall < 0.001, "<0.001",
    sprintf("%.3f", jt_overall)
  ))

wt_wide <- bind_rows(overall_row, wt_wide_indic)

cat("\nWaiting time (days) by indication and year:\n")
print(wt_wide)

# ── gt table ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
wt_gt <- wt_wide %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "indication") %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Waiting Time at Status 1A by Indication and Listing Year"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(p_jt_fmt = "JT p-value") %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label   = "Listing Year — Median Wait (IQR)",
    columns = starts_with("yr_")
  ) %>%
  cols_label_with(
    fn      = function(x) gsub("yr_", "", x),
    columns = starts_with("yr_")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_column_labels()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
    locations = cells_stub()
  ) %>%
```
