``` {r waiting time analysis}
  tab_style(
    style     = list(cell_fill(color = "gray95"),
                     cell_text(weight = "bold")),
    locations = cells_stub(rows = "All Status 1A")
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style     = cell_fill(color = "gray95"),
    locations = cells_body(rows = indication ==
                             "All Status 1A")
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote  = "Jonckheere-Terpstra Test for Monotonic Trend across Listing Years",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = p_jt_fmt)
  ) %>%
  opt_table_font(font = "Arial") %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size         = 12,
    heading.title.font.size = 14,
    column_labels.font.size = 12,
    stub.font.size          = 12
  )

print(wt_gt)

# ── Waiting time plot ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# FIXED: labels match actual indications_to_plot values
indic_colors <- c(
  "All Status 1A"                 = "#79af97",
  "MCS"                           = "#b24745",
  "Mechanical Ventilation"        = "#374e55",
  "Ductal-Dependent Circulation"  = "#df8f44",
  "Congenital Heart Disease"      = "#00a1d5",
  "1A Exception"                  = "#6a6599"
)

indic_shapes <- c(
  "All Status 1A"                 = 16,
  "MCS"                           = 15,
  "Mechanical Ventilation"        = 17,
  "Ductal-Dependent Circulation"  = 18,
  "Congenital Heart Disease"      = 8,
  "1A Exception"                  = 4
)

wt_plot_data <- bind_rows(
  wt_by_year,
  wt_by_year %>% mutate(indication = "All Status 1A")
) %>%
  group_by(indication, list_year) %>%
  summarise(
    median = median(time_1a, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    indication = factor(indication, levels = c(
      "All Status 1A",
      "MCS",
      "Mechanical Ventilation",
      "Ductal-Dependent Circulation",
      "Congenital Heart Disease",
      "1A Exception"
    ))
  )

fig_wt_year <- ggplot(wt_plot_data,
                      aes(x     = list_year,
                          y     = median,
                          color = indication,
                          shape = indication,
                          group = indication)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_color_manual(values = indic_colors,
                     name   = "Indication") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = indic_shapes,
                     name   = "Indication") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2016:2024) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 150),
                     breaks = seq(0, 150, 25),
                     expand = expansion(
                       mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(
    x = "Listing Year",
    y = "Median Waiting Time at Status 1A (Days)"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    legend.text        = element_text(size = 14),
    legend.title       = element_text(size = 14,
                                      face = "bold"),
    axis.text          = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.text.x        = element_text(angle = 45,
                                      hjust = 1),
    axis.title         = element_text(face = "bold",
                                      size = 14),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_line(color = "gray90",
                                      linewidth = 0.3)
  )

print(fig_wt_year)

```


``` {r table 1}


# ── Re-run with extended date filter ──────────────────────────────
ped_cands_snap <- thoracic_data %>%
  filter(WL_ORG == "HR", INIT_AGE < 18,
         as.Date(INIT_DATE) <= mdy("06-30-2025")) %>%
  mutate(INIT_DATE = as.Date(INIT_DATE),
         END_DATE  = as.Date(END_DATE)) %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE, END_DATE, REM_CD)

ped_hx_snap <- thoracic_wlhistory_data %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% ped_cands_snap$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  mutate(CHG_DATE = as.Date(CHG_DATE)) %>%
  left_join(ped_cands_snap %>% dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, END_DATE),
            by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  arrange(WL_ID_CODE, CHG_DATE) %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  mutate(
    CHG_END_DATE = lead(CHG_DATE, default = NA),
    CHG_END_DATE = if_else(is.na(CHG_END_DATE), END_DATE, CHG_END_DATE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

# ── Initial listing status ─────────────────────────────────────────
initial_status <- ped_hx_snap %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  slice_min(CHG_DATE, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(initial_status = factor(case_when(
    UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2010 ~ "Status 1A",
    UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2020 ~ "Status 1B",
    UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2030 ~ "Status 2",
    UNOS_CAND_STAT_CD == 2999 ~ "Inactive",
    TRUE                      ~ NA_character_),
    levels = c("Status 1A", "Status 1B", "Status 2", "Inactive"))) %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, initial_status)

# ── Device ever supported — non-exclusive flags only ────────────────
# Per Kevin: MCS device in Table 1 should NOT be hierarchical/mutually
# exclusive. Each device flag reported independently; totals may
# exceed 100% for patients with multiple device types during listing.
device_ever_flags <- ped_mcs_analytic %>%
  filter(WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  summarise(
    has_ecmo   = any(device_group == "ECMO"),
    has_bh     = any(device_group %in%
                       c("Berlin Heart - Left", "Berlin Heart - Right",
                         "Berlin Heart - Single")),
    has_bivad  = any(device_group %in%
                       c("Right VAD", "Single VAD (SVAD)")),
    has_perc   = any(device_group == "Percutaneous LVAD"),
    has_ndlvad = any(device_group == "Non-Dischargeable LVAD"),
    has_dlvad  = any(device_group == "Durable LVAD"),
    has_other  = any(device_group == "Other MCS"),
    .groups    = "drop"
  )


# ── Table 1 data ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
table1_data <- analytic_era_2025 %>%
  left_join(
    thoracic_data %>%
      mutate(WL_ID_CODE = as.numeric(WL_ID_CODE)) %>%
      dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_AGE, GENDER, ETHCAT,
             ABO, INIT_WGT_KG_CALC, TCR_DGN),
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  ) %>%
  left_join(initial_status,    by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  left_join(device_ever_flags, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  mutate(
    sex = factor(ifelse(GENDER == "M", "Male", "Female"),
                 levels = c("Male", "Female")),
    race = factor(case_when(
      ETHCAT == 1 ~ "White",
      ETHCAT == 2 ~ "Black",
      ETHCAT == 4 ~ "Hispanic/Latino",
      ETHCAT == 5 ~ "Asian",
      TRUE        ~ "Other"),
      levels = c("White", "Black", "Hispanic/Latino", "Asian", "Other")),
    age_group = factor(case_when(
      INIT_AGE < 1                    ~ "<1 Year",
      INIT_AGE >= 1 & INIT_AGE < 5   ~ "1-4 Years",
      INIT_AGE >= 5 & INIT_AGE < 12  ~ "5-11 Years",
      INIT_AGE >= 12                  ~ ">11 Years"),
      levels = c("<1 Year", "1-4 Years", "5-11 Years", ">11 Years")),
    blood_type = factor(case_when(
      ABO %in% c("A", "A1", "A2") ~ "A",
      ABO %in% c("A1B", "A2B")    ~ "AB",
      TRUE                         ~ ABO)),
    wgt_cat = factor(case_when(
      INIT_WGT_KG_CALC < 10                          ~ "<10 kg",
      INIT_WGT_KG_CALC >= 10 & INIT_WGT_KG_CALC < 25 ~ "10-25 kg",
      INIT_WGT_KG_CALC >= 25                          ~ ">25 kg"),
      levels = c("<10 kg", "10-25 kg", ">25 kg")),
    diagnosis = factor(case_when(
      TCR_DGN > 999  & TCR_DGN < 1007                        ~ "Dilated Cardiomyopathy",
      TCR_DGN > 1049 & TCR_DGN < 1100                        ~ "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy",
      TCR_DGN == 1207                                         ~ "CHD - With Surgery",
      TCR_DGN %in% c(1203, 1205, 1206)                        ~ "CHD - No Surgery/Unknown",
      TCR_DGN == 1201                                         ~ "Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy",
      TCR_DGN >= 1100 & TCR_DGN <= 1199                      ~ "Re-Heart Transplant",
      TRUE                                                    ~ "Other"),
      levels = c("Dilated Cardiomyopathy", "CHD - With Surgery",
                 "CHD - No Surgery/Unknown", "Restrictive Cardiomyopathy",
                 "Hypertrophic Cardiomyopathy", "Re-Heart Transplant", "Other")),
    across(starts_with("has_"), ~ replace_na(., FALSE))
  )

# ── Table 1 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
table1_data %>%
  dplyr::select(era, age_group, sex, race, wgt_cat,
         blood_type, diagnosis, initial_status,
         has_ecmo, has_bh, has_bivad, has_perc,
         has_ndlvad, has_dlvad, has_other) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by      = era,
    missing = "ifany",
    missing_text = "Missing",
    digits  = list(all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)),
    label   = list(
      age_group        ~ "Age at Listing",
      sex              ~ "Sex",
      race             ~ "Race",
      wgt_cat          ~ "Weight",
      blood_type       ~ "Blood Type",
      diagnosis        ~ "Primary Diagnosis",
      initial_status   ~ "Status at Initial Listing",
      has_ecmo         ~ "MCS: ECMO",
      has_bh           ~ "MCS: Berlin Heart",
      has_bivad        ~ "MCS: Right/Single/Biventricular Support",
      has_perc         ~ "MCS: Percutaneous LVAD",
      has_ndlvad       ~ "MCS: Non-Dischargeable LVAD",
      has_dlvad        ~ "MCS: Durable LVAD",
      has_other        ~ "MCS: Other"
    )
  ) %>%
  add_p(test.args = all_tests("chisq.test") ~
          list(workspace = 2e7)) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  as_gt()

```


``` {r table by device}

#eTable5!
# ── Device classification at INITIAL LISTING (not "ever", not Status 1A-only) ──
# Uses the same hierarchy as the primary time-varying model (ECMO > Berlin
# Heart > Right/Single/Biventricular > Non-DC LVAD > Durable LVAD > Other),
# evaluated at each candidate's INIT_DATE rather than first Status 1A date,
# and applied to the full analytic cohort (all statuses), not just 1A.
device_at_initial_listing <- analytic_era_2025 %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE) %>%
  mutate(
    device_final = map2_chr(
      WL_ID_CODE, INIT_DATE,
      ~ classify_device_analytic(dt = .y, wl_ids = .x) %>%
        pull(device_final)
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(WL_ID_CODE, device_initial = device_final)

cat("Device distribution at initial listing:\n")
device_at_initial_listing %>%
  count(device_initial, sort = TRUE) %>%
  print()

# ── Table: Baseline characteristics by device at initial listing ───
table_device_data <- table1_data %>%
  left_join(device_at_initial_listing, by = "WL_ID_CODE") %>%
  mutate(
    device_initial = factor(
      replace_na(device_initial, "No MCS"),
      levels = c("ECMO", "Berlin Heart", "Right/Single/Biventricular Support",
                "Non-Dischargeable LVAD", "Durable LVAD", "Other MCS", "No MCS")
    )
  )

table_device_data %>%
  dplyr::select(device_initial, age_group, sex, race, wgt_cat,
         blood_type, diagnosis, initial_status) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by      = device_initial,
    missing = "ifany",
    missing_text = "Missing",
    digits  = list(all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)),
    label   = list(
      age_group        ~ "Age at Listing",
      sex              ~ "Sex",
      race             ~ "Race",
      wgt_cat          ~ "Weight",
      blood_type       ~ "Blood Type",
      diagnosis        ~ "Primary Diagnosis",
      initial_status   ~ "Status at Initial Listing"
    )
  ) %>%
  add_p(
    test = list(all_categorical() ~ "fisher.test"),
    test.args = all_categorical() ~ list(simulate.p.value = TRUE, B = 10000)
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title    = "Baseline Characteristics by Device Type at Initial Listing",
    subtitle = "Device classification reflects support active on the date of initial waitlist listing"
  )



```




``` {r berlin heart breakdown}
#eTable 6!
# ── First recorded Berlin Heart configuration during waitlist support ──
# Includes every candidate who received Berlin Heart support at any point.
# When multiple Berlin Heart components were implanted on the same earliest
# date, all components are used to determine the initial configuration.

berlin_subtype_initial <- ped_mcs_analytic %>%
  filter(
    WL_ID_CODE %in% analytic_era_2025$WL_ID_CODE,
    device_group %in% c(
      "Berlin Heart - Left",
      "Berlin Heart - Right",
      "Berlin Heart - Single"
    ),
    !is.na(IMPLANT_DATE)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    IMPLANT_DATE = as.Date(IMPLANT_DATE)
  ) %>%
  group_by(WL_ID_CODE) %>%
  mutate(
    first_berlin_date = min(IMPLANT_DATE, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(IMPLANT_DATE == first_berlin_date) %>%
  summarise(
    first_berlin_date = first(first_berlin_date),
    has_left   = any(device_group == "Berlin Heart - Left"),
    has_right  = any(device_group == "Berlin Heart - Right"),
    has_single = any(device_group == "Berlin Heart - Single"),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    berlin_subtype_initial = case_when(
      has_single ~ "Berlin Heart - SVAD",
      has_right  ~ "Berlin Heart - BiVAD/Right-Only",
      has_left   ~ "Berlin Heart - LVAD"
    )
  ) %>%
  dplyr::select(
    WL_ID_CODE,
    first_berlin_date,
    berlin_subtype_initial
  )

table_berlin_subtype_data <- table1_data %>%
  inner_join(
    berlin_subtype_initial,
    by = "WL_ID_CODE"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    berlin_subtype_initial = factor(
      berlin_subtype_initial,
      levels = c(
        "Berlin Heart - LVAD",
        "Berlin Heart - BiVAD/Right-Only",
        "Berlin Heart - SVAD"
      )
    )
  )

cat(
  "\nCandidates included in Berlin Heart subtype table:",
  n_distinct(table_berlin_subtype_data$WL_ID_CODE),
  "\n"
)

table_berlin_subtype_data %>%
  dplyr::select(
    berlin_subtype_initial,
    age_group,
    wgt_cat,
    diagnosis
  ) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = berlin_subtype_initial,
    missing = "ifany",
    missing_text = "Missing",
    digits = list(
      all_categorical() ~ c(0, 1)
    ),
    label = list(
      age_group ~ "Age at Listing",
      wgt_cat   ~ "Weight",
      diagnosis ~ "Primary Diagnosis"
    )
  ) %>%
  add_p(
    test = list(
      all_categorical() ~ "fisher.test"
    ),
    test.args = all_categorical() ~ list(
      simulate.p.value = TRUE,
      B = 10000
    )
  ) %>%
  add_overall() %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title =
      "Age, Weight, and Diagnosis by Initial Berlin Heart Configuration",
    subtitle =
      "First recorded Berlin Heart configuration during waitlist support"
  )

```
